statement: The author-led preprint manuscript package is assembled and passed the Stage 3B-39 submission-readiness gate.
required_caveat: This is not a peer-review certification.

statement: The DEU posterior summary and matched native comparison may be reported as scoped, caveated internal analysis results.
required_caveat: Do not phrase this as final model superiority.

statement: The internal independent-validation evidence/BF lineage may be reported with caveats.
required_caveat: Do not present it as externally validated peer-reviewed evidence.

statement: TT_lite may be described as a diagnostic monitor excluded from sampled posterior/evidence likelihoods.
required_caveat: Do not imply TT_lite was sampled in the production posterior or evidence calculation.

statement: The tri-anchor ledger may be described as retained context for monitoring high-l, lowl+TTTEEE, and full-objective behavior.
required_caveat: It is monitoring context, not a substitute for a likelihood-scope statement.

statement: The results have been independently peer reviewed or externally certified.
required_caveat: The path is author-led preprint release; no external reviewer result was booked.

statement: DEU is established as superior to the native/baseline model.
required_caveat: The evidence line is internal/caveated and not a final model-selection claim.

statement: TT_lite was included in the sampled posterior or evidence calculation.
required_caveat: TT_lite remained diagnostic-only and outside the production/evidence likelihood scope.

statement: This is a final publication-grade claim set.
required_caveat: This is a preprint-server readiness package with explicit caveats and guardrails.
Stage 3B-39 is an audit/package gate only.
